productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex ST Airline Blue Bags
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this copiously spacious airline shoulder bag. Inspired by the retro style of the 70s and 80s, this bag makes for a great addition to your travel bag collectionMade of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenanceOne main zippered compartment with a separator that has a velcro closureOne zippered compartment on the front that makes for the flap that covers a spacious pouch on the front with a velcro closureWide adjustable shoulder strap made of synthetic twill tapeBrand name and collection in print on the front and backCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
